NearestVA: Jennifer Moreno Department of Veterans Affairs Medical Center
Veterans Benefits: California offers disabled veteran property tax exemptions, a veterans property tax exemption, dependent college fee waivers, CalVet home loans, and a limited military retirement/SBP income exclusion for eligible taxpayers.
LGBTQSource: HRC MEI 2025 + MAP state policy score
Description: Large coastal Southern California city with a major VA medical center, Navy and Marine Corps presence, life sciences and software clusters, beaches, trails, arts amenities, and very high housing costs. City-level presidential returns are strongly liberal, though San Diego shifted about 2.8 points Republican on two-party presidential vote share from 2016 to 2024.
